description: Legal record (#59) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 20v of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated 9 Adar II 5323 AM (1563 CE). Farjallah b. ʿAbd al-Bāqī al-Levi acknowledges a debt that he owes to ʿAbd al-Karīm b. Yaḥya Fayruz in connection with a shipment of wine. The pair agree to a monthly repayment cycle that will persist into the following year 5324 AM. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
